span.p:
Ranked case scope
decision at stake, rank, confidence

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Grounded evidence bundle
artifacts, code refs, timestamps,
components, surfaces, approvals, clearance

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Reasoning policies
grounding, non-generic output,
self-reference downgrade, disagreement surfacing

span.p:
Ownership Resolver
who owns the newest change

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Causal Analyst
best explanation of what happened

Counterfactual Analyst

span.p:
Gap Analyst
missing or weak evidence

span.p:
Risk Analyst
bad action if the story is wrong

span.p:
Adjudicator
leading story, rival story,
confidence, disagreement state

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Optional provider refinement
focused subset only

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Editor
decision brief without actor chatter

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Systemic synthesis
collapse repeated case noise into shared causes

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Packet recommendation seed
manual, deterministic, AI-engine, hybrid

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Selective execution + cache reuse
fingerprint-gated actor reruns

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Proof routing discipline
named artifacts and real evidence routes only

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Run-scoped provider breaker
first timeout or transport failure disables
provider enrichment for remaining cases
